conflict: Two people with brutal shared history must negotiate terms of sustained proximity; the Manor is already responding to her presence
consequence: Terms set — they are bound to proximity. The house has already started changing, and Draco notices but doesn't mention it
must_land_beats: Draco's isolation rendered concretely — the Manor too large, his life too small, careful and precise and starved
Hermione arrives; the negotiation is exact, professional, last-name-basis
The Dark Mark's new behavior — pain without signal, magic restless
The Manor opens a forgotten corridor when she enters — Draco registers this silently
pressure_source: Two people with brutal shared history must negotiate terms of sustained proximity; the Manor is already responding to her presence
secondary_character_beats: Narcissa referenced in passing — her absence from the Manor noted as recent, deliberate

setups_to_plant.description: The house opens a corridor Draco forgot existed the moment Hermione enters — first sign of differential treatment
The drawing room is not mentioned but Draco's awareness of specific rooms — which ones he avoids, which corridors he doesn't take — establishes that the Manor's geography is emotionally loaded

state_shift: Terms set — they are bound to proximity. The house has already started changing, and Draco notices but doesn't mention it
